description_long: This is a solid, metallic dumbbell with a hexagonal shape on both ends, designed to prevent rolling when placed on the ground. The handle is slightly contoured for grip and appears to be made of the same material as the end caps, with a smooth, matte finish. The end caps are flat and broad, providing stability, and one end displays a visible weight marking and brand logo. The surface shows minor scuff marks and a slightly worn appearance, suggesting regular use but no significant damage. The overall color is a uniform gray, typical of cast iron or steel gym equipment. This dumbbell is compact and robust, suitable for strength training in urban gyms, parks, or home garages.
description: A gray, hexagonal-ended metal dumbbell with a contoured handle and visible weight marking, showing minor wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing both hexagonal end caps and the contoured handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the flat hexagonal face with visible brand logo and weight marking.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other hexagonal end and handle.
description_view_3: End-on view of the opposite hexagonal face, with no visible markings.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, contoured handle with a round cross-section and smooth, matte texture.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat end caps made of metal with a matte finish and minor surface wear.
attribute_brand_logo: Present; white printed text on one end cap, partially readable.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Present; white printed marking on one end cap, showing '10KG'.
attribute_condition: Slightly worn with minor scuffs, but structurally intact and functional.
